index.heroTitle: Evidence-based resources and community for veterinary professionals.
index.heroText: Baytic brings peer-reviewed case studies, clinical guidelines, and continuing education together in a trusted member portal. Browse resources, connect with colleagues, and track your professional development.
index.highlight1: Peer-reviewed case library searchable by specialty and tags.
index.highlight2: Continuing education tracking and certificates for members.
index.highlight3: Verified veterinarian directory and clinic profiles.

login.title: Member sign in
login.text: Access your Baytic account to read clinical resources, track continuing education, save case studies, and participate in the professional community.

vets.title: Veterinarian profiles
vets.subtitle: Browse featured and verified veterinarians, review their specialties, and find experts by location or experience.
vets.searchPlaceholder: Search name, specialty, credential, or location

about.title: About Baytic
about.lead: Baytic is a public association created to support the growth of veterinary practice and to encourage scientific, educational, and practical work in animal health.
about.sideText: We provide a trusted platform for knowledge sharing, professional collaboration, ethical practice, and public education on animal health.
about.card1Text: Advance veterinary practice and strengthen collaboration across the profession.
about.card2Text: Courses, seminars, roundtables, meetings, and international cooperation.
about.card3Text: Volunteerism, equality, transparency, and evidence-based practice.
about.highlight1Text: Ongoing communication between members, experts, and partners.
about.highlight2Text: Outreach on animal health, prevention, and treatment.
about.highlight3Text: Joint initiatives and projects with local and international organizations.

history.title: How Baytic started
history.lead: The charter highlights the milestones that shaped Baytic as a professional association.
history.m1Text: Founders approved the charter and launched the association.
history.m2Text: The association obtains legal entity status and begins formal operations in Azerbaijan.
history.m3Text: Education, research, meetings, and public initiatives in veterinary medicine.
history.m4Text: Expanding partnerships, regional cooperation, and the professional community.
history.value2: Non-profit operation and no profit distribution
history.futureText: Baytic will continue expanding as a sustainable development platform for the veterinary community.

membership.title: Who can join
membership.lead: The association may accept individuals age 18+ and legal entities in accordance with the law.
membership.card1Text: Membership starts with a written application to the Board.
membership.card2Text: Applications are reviewed within one month and decided by majority vote.
membership.card3Text: Participation in governance, events, and access to organizational information.
membership.card4Text: Follow the charter, carry out decisions, and participate in events.
membership.a1Label: How is the membership fee set?
membership.a1Text: The amount is determined by the Board.
membership.a2Text: By voluntary resignation or removal for charter violations.
membership.a3Label: What happens if there is a dispute?
membership.a3Text: Members may appeal to the supreme body and to the court.

governance.title: Organizational structure
governance.lead: Baytic is governed by the General Assembly, the Board, and the Audit Commission.
governance.card1Text: Highest governing body; adopts the charter, reports, elections, and dissolution decisions.
governance.card2Text: Manages day-to-day leadership, admissions, and project proposals.
governance.card3Text: Oversees finance and activity compliance and handles incoming requests.
governance.a1Text: The chair represents the association, signs agreements, and organizes execution of decisions.
governance.a2Text: When more than half of the members participate and a majority vote is reached.
governance.a3Label: How can the association be dissolved?
governance.a3Text: By reorganization or dissolution in the manner prescribed by law.
governance.footerText: Financial, statistical, and other reports are prepared and submitted in accordance with the law.
